block_00: The 5 reasons why traders lose instead of earning
block_01: Trading is hard, no matter what people may say. But there is an explanation to why some traders lose more frequently than others. The reasons can be categorized as internal and external: those that a trader can control, and those that traders can’t influence.
block_02: In this article, we will look at how a trader’s mental and emotional state affects their behavior. We will also see how the market is driven and how crowd psychology plays a role here.
block_03: How to break a losing streak and have more control over your capital? Read the full article to find out.
